'''Morrigan's throwing axe (bh)''' is a ranged weapon requiring 75 [[Ranged]] to wield, and is purchased from the [[Bounty Hunter Store]] for 300 points. Unlike other [[thrownaxes]], it is not stackable and effectively provides unlimited "charges".

As with all [[Ancient Warriors' equipment]] from Bounty Hunter, it is initially purchased in inactive form, and must be charged with 5,000,000 coins before it can be used by the player. Upon dying in [[PvP]], the coins used to activate the item are given to the killer, and players are left with the inactive item.

In addition, it can only be used within [[Daimon's Crater]], [[Castle Wars]], [[Clan Wars]], [[Soul Wars]], the [[TzHaar Fight Pit]], and both the [[player-owned house]] and [[Clan Hall]] combat rings; attempting to attack anything outside the listed areas will result in the player being interrupted from doing so.

==Special attack==
[[File:Hamstring.gif|thumb|260px|A player performing Morrigan's throwing axe's special attack.]]
Morrigan's throwing axe has a [[special attack]], ''Hamstring'', that consumes 50% of the player's [[special attack energy]]. ''Hamstring'' has 150% accuracy and deals between 50% and 150% of the user's max hit.

Against players, it will also increase the rate that the target's [[run energy]] is drained by six times. When this occurs, the target will receive a message in their chatbox stating {{mes|You've been hamstrung! For the next minute, your run energy will drain 6x faster.}}
